title: Hub Bundle Pointer
description: Reusable bundle-pointer shape for skill + workflow manifests. References a tar.gz served alongside the manifest on GitHub Pages.

url.description: Bundle URL relative to the Pages base (e.g., 'skills/io.github.ziee/configure-llm-providers/1.0.0.tar.gz'). Consumer joins with DEFAULT_PAGES_BASE.

sha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the tar.gz bytes. Consumer verifies after download.

size_bytes.description: Bundle size in bytes. Used for pre-download cap check (10 MiB max).

file_count.description: Number of regular files inside the bundle (excludes directories). Cap: 256.

entry_point.description: Conventional entry path within the extracted bundle ('SKILL.md' for skills; 'workflow.yaml' for workflows).
